writing.title: Writing Task 2: Environment, society, and health
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) about environment or health, combining grammar from earlier chapters.
writing.sampleAnswer: A great deal of plastic is thrown away every day. These rules must be followed to protect the environment. If people exercised more, they would be healthier. A large number of people now prefer a healthier lifestyle.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 3 cấu trúc đã học trước đó
Chủ đề bám sát môi trường/sức khỏe/xã hội
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
